name: Supremes En Vermouth
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the chicken breasts, cutting each in half.
2. Dip the halves into sour cream.
3. Roll the halves in bread crumbs.
4. Roll up the bread crumb-wrapped pieces and place them in a greased baking pan.
5. Drizzle with melted butter and vermouth.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes.
7. Sauce: Serve with a sauce made from 1 can condensed Cream of Mushroom (or cream of chicken or both) soup, diluted with half a can of light cream, and flavored with vermouth, heated until bubbling.
